title: frontend: EditorDialog: Warn when resource modified during edit
author: sudhidutta7694

findings.description: No Vitest test covers the new conflict detection path (resourceVersionsDiffer && userHasEdits). A unit test simulating external item update with unsaved edits would prevent regressions.
resourceModifiedWarning Alert placement could be above the editor for better visibility in small-viewport activity panels.
isActivityOpenRef correctly guards Activity.update calls when editor is not open.
previousVersionRef updated on conflict detection prevents repeated warning for same version change.
409 error message improved from generic 'Conflicts when trying to perform operation (code 409)' to actionable user guidance.
